package:
puzzlebot_gazebo 0.0.0
ROS 2 Gazebo simulation package for the Puzzlebot. Contains a custom maze world, a ROS-Gazebo topic bridge configuration, and a launch file to spawn and simulate the Puzzlebot in a Gazebo environment.
Ulises Carrizalez Lerín Laura Helena Molina Jimenez Karla Zoé Rebolledo Argueta
MIT>
ament_cmake
ros_gz_sim puzzlebot_description ros_gz_bridge
ament_cmake
